h1: Custom Blenders & Shakers for Branded Promotions
metaDescription: Shop custom blenders and shakers for corporate gifts and events. Perfect for health-conscious branding. Easy personalization.
introHtml:
Marketing directors, HR directors, and business owners looking to promote health and wellness will find custom blenders and shakers an ideal giveaway. Whether you're outfitting a company gym, hosting a fitness event, or launching a wellness challenge, these practical products keep your brand top-of-mind during workouts and daily routines.

Our selection includes durable blender bottles for protein shakes, insulated shakers for cold drinks, and portable blenders for on-the-go smoothies. Options range from classic 20-ounce shaker cups to electric rechargeable blenders. All can be imprinted with your logo using screen printing, pad printing, or full-color digital transfer for crisp, lasting designs.

Bulk orders typically start at low minimums, with pricing that scales favorably for large quantities. Lead times vary by decoration method — screen printing often ships fastest. Request a quote or order samples to ensure the perfect fit for your team or event.

faqs.q: What are the minimum order quantities for custom blenders and shakers?
faqs.a: Minimum order quantities vary by product. For standard shaker bottles, MOQs can be as low as 50 units. For electric blenders, MOQs are typically higher, around 100–250 units. Contact us for exact minimums on your preferred item.

faqs.q: How are logos applied to blenders and shakers?
faqs.a: Logos can be applied using screen printing, pad printing, or full-color digital transfer. Screen printing is common for shaker bottles and offers durability. Pad printing works well on curved surfaces like blender bases. Full-color transfers allow photographic detail.

faqs.q: What is the typical production lead time?
faqs.a: Production lead time ranges from 5 to 15 business days depending on order size and decoration method. Screen printed shakers often ship within 7–10 days. Custom electric blenders may take longer. Rush orders are available for an additional fee.

faqs.q: Can I get a sample before placing a bulk order?
faqs.a: Yes, samples are available for most products. You can order a blank or decorated sample to evaluate quality, size, and imprint appearance. Sample costs are usually deducted from the final order if you purchase within 30 days.

faqs.q: Are the blenders and shakers dishwasher safe?
faqs.a: Most shaker bottles are top-rack dishwasher safe. Blenders with electrical components should be hand washed. Always check the care instructions for each product. We recommend hand washing to preserve logo longevity.

heroAltText: Custom blenders and shakers with company logos, including a stainless steel blender bottle and a portable electric blender
